general_info.definition: Lattice phosphorus-doped graphene quantum dots (P-GQDs) with tunable fluorescence synthesized via green preparation

method.conditions: Lecithin dissolved in 20mL alcohol((5 mg mL 1) then heated at 120°C for 240 hours in a Teflon-lined autoclave

optical.emission_max: 457-632 nm (tunable with Phosphorus concentration in P-GQDs); 565 nm(optimal emission)

structural.crystallinity: 0.24 nm lattice spacing which can be attributed to the (1 1 2 0) diffraction planes of graphene

applications.performance: No obvious change in metabolic activity of the tested rADSCs cells even at 500 μg/mL concentration. Efficient cellular internalization indicated by PL signal with different colours that can be observed inside the cells
applications.comparative_advantage: High yield (71 wt%), tunable emission across visible spectrum, excellent photostability. Green preparation. High quantum yield (0.54-0.73). Controllable emission wavelength (457-632nm)

feedback.label: Good
